title: Cute Mob Models
description: Replaces generic minecraft models with the designs used in the MobTalker mod.
body:
![LOGO](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tomanex/Image-dumping/refs/heads/main/mods/cmm/cmm_logo2.png)

## Support The Team
**Discord:** https://discord.com/invite/3qmMVa97eM

**Twitter:** https://x.com/CuteMobTeam

## Overview 
This mod replaces generic minecraft models with the designs used in the mobtalker mod. It's mostly just a visual change, though some options allow to change the mob's model to match its hitbox, as well as a few other small things like removing the blaze's smoke or blaze rods.

* The mod includes both Cute Mob Models 1 & 2.

Note: this is mainly a client side mod. installing it on a server only has 2 effects, enabling the GhastS mob spawning and changing the mob hitboxes.
The ability to change mob hitboxes is currently disabled due to crashing and compatibility problems.

## Other Versions
* CMM Resource Pack - by emmie_4
* CMM Bedrock Edition - by NGFuji.mp4

## Other Projects
* CMMRP: Experiments and Hobbies - by rokuyonshirotamaya
* CMMRP: Sound Pack - by Sinty
* CMM: Immersive Engineer Patch - by JellyBabyBomber
* CMM: Kamen Rider Craft Patch - by 498tta

## Permission
The CMM Remake mod was originally created by Yarrmateys and is now Open Sourced after the original page was abandoned.

Here's a screenshot proof of the old description from the original mod page before it was removed:

![Yarrmatey's Page](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tomanex/Image-dumping/refs/heads/main/mods/cmm/Untitled824_20251108132418.png)
